title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Complexity Forensics
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a defended multi-structure dispatch system and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate operation frequency, scale, latency, memory, and consistency needs into structure criteria.
Combine structures while documenting duplicated state and synchronization invariants.
Present loop invariants, induction, or contradiction arguments appropriate to each component.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Design Defense correctness-and-cost proof for this debug task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Design Defense assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Solve a bounded debug instance with 8 inputs. State the invariant, trace each state change, count the chosen operation, and retain the smallest counterexample. Competency probe: Defend alternatives, limitations, failure recovery, and measured tradeoffs to reviewers.
